channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inside Ralph Lauren's Fall 2026 Show: Timeless Glamour, a 'Renegade Spirit' and Anne Hathaway's 'Cinderella Moment' (Exclusive)
item.description: Kicking off New York Fashion Week, Ralph Lauren unveiled a collection rooted in adventure and reinvention in front of celebrity guests including Anne ...

item.title: Robert Irwin Declares Himself ‘Khaki Sally’ After Joining Role Model on Stage at Australia Show
item.description: The 22-year-old son of Steve Irwin won season 34 of 'Dancing With The Stars' in December 2025

item.title: Robert Duvall, Oscar Winner and Star of “The Godfather” and “Apocalypse Now”, Dies at 95
item.description: Duvall's acting career spanned seven decades

item.title: Federal Judge Invokes '1984' While Ordering Trump Administration to Restore Slavery Exhibit in Philadelphia Park
item.description: National Park Service workers were seen dismantling a memorial to enslaved people at The President’s House in January

item.title: Apple Martin Reveals Her Post-College Plans After Dropping Her Law School Aspirations
item.description: The 21-year-old daughter of Gwyneth Paltrow and Chris Martin previously said she wanted to go to law school after college graduation

item.title: Trump Brutally Mocked on Presidents Day With Satirical Floats at German Festival
item.description: Donald Trump might’ve been celebrating Presidents Day stateside ... but over in Germany, they were dragging him through the streets -- literally. Düss...

item.title: Valentine's Hangover -- Guess The Sexy Star In Lacy Lingerie
item.description: Cure your Valentine's hangover with this sweet treat: a sexy celeb in red-hot lingerie ... Can you guess who she is?! She's a TikTok queen from France...

item.title: James Van Der Beek Faced Massive Tax Debt Years Before His Death
item.description: "Dawson’s Creek" actor James Van Der Beek was dealing with a massive six-figure tax debt years before his death ... TMZ has learned. The actor and his...

item.title: Kandi Burruss Talks First Valentine's Day Post Todd Tucker Divorce
item.description: Singer and "The Real Housewives of Atlanta" star Kandi Burruss chatted with us about her first Valentine's Day since splitting from her estranged husb...

item.title: California Congressman Eric Swalwell's Secret Erotic Poetry Uncovered
item.description: Congressman Eric Swalwell was evidently a big fan of erotica in college ... and now we're getting a glimpse of some of what he wrote! The Daily Mail u...
